step_2_image_prompt: Take the persona reference photo as the locked source for her face, hair color and styling, body proportions, dusty pink sports bra and matching high-waist leggings, gold anklet, and the entire sunlit pilates studio scene including the cream mat, warm wood floor, and out-of-focus sage-green reformer — all of these must remain faithful to the reference. She is now cradling the Alluvi product in both hands resting in her lap: palms facing up and slightly together, fingertips lightly supporting the underside of the box, both thumbs resting on either side of the front face framing it symmetrically, the box angled with its front face tilted slightly upward toward the camera so the full label is visible from the slightly-below eye-line camera position. The product is approximately 7 inches wide, sized realistically relative to her hands and lap. Her arms, shoulder posture, and hand position may shift slightly to make the two-handed cradle look natural and not stamped on. Both hands must remain visible in the frame holding the product together — do not hide either hand under the box, behind her thigh, or crop them out of the frame. The Alluvi product packaging must match the product reference photo exactly — every text element, color, graphic, and certification badge as shown. Preserve the packaging's natural white base color, only apply the scene's directional lighting on top. Match the lighting direction of the persona scene: bright soft morning daylight from a tall window on her right, warm bone tones across the wood floor and mat, gentle warm wash on her right side and on the box surface, with a soft shadow falling toward her left.
